horoscope: Today's Venus transits can stir up a bit of tension or produce surprises, dear Aries. People may be hard to pin down, or there can be so many distractions and interruptions that it's difficult to think clearly. As the day advances, you may be doing some see-sawing between obligations and pleasure. Of course, this can lead to a lukewarm state of limbo, and nothing gets accomplished if you're not careful, so find ways to either combine them or divide your time wholeheartedly. There can be too many demands from others, or you may feel used or underappreciated at the moment, making it essential to look for and focus on choices that empower you rather than dwelling on negative feelings. It's not easy to stick to a schedule today, as there can be many distractions. Resolve to be flexible and allow for errors to make the best of the day. Through today's tensions, it's your attitude that counts most. Look for the interesting detours that result from unexpected events today for the best results, as they can lead to fantastic new ideas.

Today's Venus-Uranus square brings a somewhat unpredictable or disorienting theme to the first half of the day, dear Taurus, mainly because it upsets the routine. Unexpected events can arise in your relationships, social life, or financial and business matters, potentially throwing you off and impacting your timing. Sudden attractions to people, material things, or experiences may emerge today, and these can delight you or disturb you, depending on your perspective! This transit may feel more disruptive if you've been ignoring the need to make interesting changes in your life. It's better not to commit to anything or anyone with your feelings in a state of rapid flux, and on this day before a New Moon. As well, feelings about a person or project can be up and down, even as the day advances. You may feel you have to make a tough choice, or you're keen to enjoy yourself, but worries are preventing you from wholeheartedly doing so. You can be irritated by people who seem to want to control you, or work and responsibilities are an on-and-off nag. Pay attention to the fears and emotions that surface today, as you can learn a lot about what might be holding you back from going after what and who you want. However, learn to tune out the negative distractions and focus on what truly matters for making improvements. A certain self-consciousness may be with you along romantic, creative, or recreational lines now, but you can work with it instead of against it.

Venus is currently in a cozy area of your solar chart, dear Gemini, and you have a stronger desire (and love) for comfortable and familiar situations. Today, however, you can experience a clash between wanting company or intimacy and craving more independence. It can also be a time of interruptions and changes in plans, particularly at home and in your relationships, which can irritate you but also help you establish your priorities. Do your best to stay centered and avoid falling back into tired and old behaviors of relating. You could feel you're in a bit of a tight spot, choosing between two equally enticing alternatives, but it may very well be that it's your fear of missing out that is interfering with your mood. If you're inclined to close up or withdraw, it may be a better time to work on your own.

With today's Venus transits, dear Cancer, various things may go awry, mainly related to communications and transportation. It may not be easy to focus or center yourself temporarily, and schedule changes can throw you a bit off course. You may be unsure how close you want to get to someone, or you could feel disconnected and misunderstood. Recognize the need for a little more freedom and space. As well, try not to push yourself to understand everything today, as much as you may feel the need to know! Pushing is likely to stir up unnecessary problems. Thinking too much can complicate things, and suspicion may throw you off track. Consider, too, that some information can be missing, false, or exaggerated. Adjustments to your plans and projects may be necessary. While there can be some tensions to deal with around relationships or finances, this can ultimately help balance your thinking as you consider realistic, practical angles.

Today's Venus transits can throw you a bit off-center by a money or ownership matter, dear Leo. Unexpected events could pull you out of your comfort zone. It's temporary and can lead to good things, but it can also feel a bit disruptive. Instead, these influences can stir an inner conflict between wanting to play it safe and experimenting with something new. Interruptions or schedule changes can figure strongly now, but they probably shouldn't be taken to heart. If the urge to buy something comes on suddenly, try to wait it out, because your appetite for new things can fade almost as quickly as it emerges and may be only about discontent. You might need a change in your routine for some emotional refreshment, which can be a wake-up call. As the day advances, there's a tendency to sit on the fence about a matter, perhaps because you sense that it may not be as wonderful as promised, or because you are uncertain of whether your perceptions are objective enough to hold weight. There is a tendency to second-guess decisions, and it may be wise to wait things out. There may be disagreements with others about core values and money, or, if clashes are not overt, you may instead feel a little out of sync with someone and perhaps irritated if you think they don't trust your ability to manage your life well. Consider that on this day before a New Moon, it's probably better to observe than lock anything down.

With today's Venus transits, you might experience conflicts with others or within, dear Virgo, or you need to deal with unreliable or unavailable people. Schedules can be off, as unexpected situations or feelings can temporarily dampen your enthusiasm. If it's an internal conflict, you might see-saw between wanting to be close to someone or something and craving your independence. The day requires flexibility and a strong sense of self. Consider that people are absorbed in their issues, and if you don't worry about what that might mean or take it too seriously, you may very well enjoy the space and freedom that this affords you to do your own thing. Especially on this day before a New Moon, and given tense aspects, it's not a good time to reach an agreement or a compromise. While you are more approachable these days with Venus in your sign, part of you requires periods devoted to reflection on, or processing of, recent activities. This can keep you in a state of limbo, but it need not be uncomfortable. While there may be unusual feelings today, the adjustments you make as a result can go a long way towards helping you reach a better, more realistic place.

You may crave a change of pace or another form of emotional refreshment today, dear Libra. Restlessness is likely, particularly with Venus transits shaking things up. There can be some missed connections or schedule changes. Venus is in your private, subconscious sector, encouraging an inward focus, while Uranus is prodding you to learn new things, share your ideas, and seek different pleasures. This conflict can play out internally, or external events can trigger it. Either way, it's about stoking your curiosity. While you may be thrown off-center, things that surface unpredictably today may very well need a release and can also help stimulate necessary changes. You're likely to be doing some looking back and processing of recent events with Venus in your privacy sector these days, and while this is appropriate now, it's important not to overthink things today. Emotions can bubble to the surface at unusual and possibly inconvenient moments. If you pay attention to the cues, though, you can learn a tremendous amount about what is truly behind your fears and insecurities, particularly about a relationship.

Today's Venus transits can stir tension and may bring on changes, dear Scorpio, and you can feel unprepared. Instead, following a routine, instructions, or a schedule can prove challenging for now. Surprising feelings can emerge. If appointments are canceled or plans changed, try to treat the freed-up time as a positive, as it can very well be. Also consider that while desires may seem to come out of the blue, entertaining the idea of them can lead to new perspectives and ideas that serve you well as you advance. It just may not be wise to act upon them at the moment, as they can be fleeting. As well, with a New Moon tomorrow, today is not ideal for making bold moves. Pressures might also come from or through friends, groups, or family, and it's your choice whether to succumb to it or to stand your ground. Letting something slide is not always a bad thing -- in fact, it can take more courage to do so in certain situations.

Venus forms a hard angle to erratic Uranus today, dear Sagittarius, as well as some picky aspects with other planets. As a result, there can be some mixed feelings or tension with others, depending on whether this aspect plays out internally or externally. At the heart of this, you may need a change of pace, and the sooner you identify this need and work with it, the better. Nevertheless, it's not a good time to push ahead or make big decisions, especially given it's the day before a New Moon, but observing and taking notes makes sense. Keep your personal life in its place so it doesn't come to others' attention. You might try to use the tension of today's transits positively to break free from a bad habit or out of a negative rut. Still, you can be feeling a little out of sync with others. While you are especially sensitive to your reputation or professional image at this time, you may communicate something that stirs the pot and has a bit of a backlash. Be a little more vigilant about what you say now. If you want to push boundaries, there are better times to do so.

Venus forms a square with unpredictable, rebellious Uranus today, dear Capricorn, making it challenging to keep everything in a straight line. While it's somewhat destabilizing, it can be a beneficial transit for revealing new methods. At the heart of this influence is the need to approach people and pleasures differently, or to switch up your routine to explore new feelings. However, it can surface in unexpected ways, particularly if you're out of touch with this need. You can feel as if you have a lot of blanks to fill in, and no clear way of doing so today, particularly related to money and relationships! Life may not seem as straightforward as you'd prefer it to be, and you may second-guess situations and people. The desire to sniff out a truth can be intense but may not be worth it just for the time being. Be willing to let something go if insecurity is driving it.

You can experience conflicting feelings today as you wrestle with a desire to harmonize and a simultaneous need for independence, dear Aquarius. You may crave more depth in a relationship or project on the one hand, but on the other, you're concerned about the possibility of having to follow others' schedules or agendas. Entertaining some unusual ideas may well stretch your mind out of a rut. Feeling a bit more detached from a situation can motivate you to make a break or a change. However, watch for whims since desires can come on suddenly but can be fleeting, and it may be better to wait things out until you're certain of what you want. Relationships seem a little more complicated than usual today, or this may be your feelings with Venus transits. While you probably need to make some changes, avoid obsessive thinking, which only serves to keep you in a mental or emotional circle. You can feel a little out of step with others as if you can't quite read a person or situation.

With today's Venus transits, dear Pisces, unusual feelings or experiences can be in the spotlight. You may not be able to rely on or lean on someone now, but some detachment in relationships can be healthy at times like these. At the least, it allows you some space to do your own thing and helps you appreciate what you have. There are times when others crowd us to the point that we can't process our feelings for them, and some emotional space is appropriate. Changes in interest or schedule related to your home life can lead to new experiences and ideas. Some adjustments may be required in a relationship, or others can remind you of a past difficulty or hurt that prompts you to make a change. You should probably sit with these things, with a New Moon tomorrow to redirect you. It may very well be that you are overthinking things, so don't rule that out, and don't be afraid to make a few waves now if a change is what's needed most, but if you want to make a big proclamation, this may not be the most receptive time.
